specification_text:
REQ-UPS-001: UPS modules shall be configured in N+1 redundancy at the block level.
REQ-UPS-002: UPS battery autonomy shall be minimum 15 minutes at full IT load.
REQ-UPS-003: UPS output voltage shall be 415V, 3-phase, 50Hz.
REQ-UPS-004: UPS system efficiency shall be minimum 96 percent at 50 percent load in double conversion mode.
REQ-UPS-005: UPS shall comply with IEC 62040.
REQ-UPS-006: Static bypass synchronization tolerance shall not exceed plus or minus 1 Hz.
REQ-UPS-007: UPS monitoring shall integrate with the Building Management System using Modbus TCP/IP.
REQ-UPS-008: Vendor shall provide factory witness test records for load bank test, battery discharge test, transfer to bypass, return from bypass, and alarm verification.
vendor_text: The proposed UPS system consists of modular UPS blocks configured as N redundancy. Battery runtime is 10 minutes at full IT load. UPS output voltage is 415V, 3-phase, 50Hz. UPS system efficiency is 96.5 percent at 50 percent load in double conversion mode. The UPS system is designed and tested in accordance with IEC 62040. Static bypass synchronization tolerance is plus or minus 2 Hz. UPS monitoring supports Modbus TCP/IP for BMS integration. Factory acceptance test procedure includes visual inspection, insulation resistance test, functional energization, and alarm simulation. Battery discharge test and transfer-to-bypass witness records will be submitted after site commissioning. No deviations are declared by the vendor.
